relationships: kab:Imawlan yessefk ad ttɛassan arraw-nsen anda ur ttilin
kab:S anda akka i la nteddu tura﹖ S axxam﹖
kab:S anda akka i la iteddu﹖
kab:Marie tella teẓra anda ay tella tkeṛṛust-nnes
kab:Tzemreḍ ad tgeḍ ayenni anda nniḍen, ma ulac aɣilif﹖
kab:Yessefk ɣef Tom ad yexdem ayagi anda nniḍen
kab:Yenna-d s anda i yella iteddu﹖
